case_title: C & C OF S.F., OFC OF THE TREASURER &TAX COLLECTOR et al VS GARCIA, JUANA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-13-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-12-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SETTLEMENT BET. THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1940. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED IN 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL PAID IN FULL AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,909.13 FILED BY C & C OF S.F., OFC OF THE TREASURER &TAX COLLECTOR BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JUANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-12-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-28-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST CASE CONT'D FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE ONE PAYMENT OF $400 ON 4/13/05; AND AT THE RATE OF $75 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON 5/15/05 & ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-28-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-29-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES ARE TO WORK OUT A REVISED PAYMENT PLAN. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
